meaning: n.(摔跤运动中)压住对方头部或颈后及一臂或二臂的手法
examples: Colonel Richard Nelson served on the school board until this year.
Nelson Piquet, three times world champion, was grievously injured.
Nelson, I think I can give you an additional 15% discount!
Nelson still sometimes keeps some of his seed, but not usually, and not much.
"Having a world champion this early in my career really is a dream come true, " said Nelson.
